name: nasa-ads
description: Search NASA ADS literature, check published claims, export citations, inspect libraries, get citation metrics, and find related papers from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: NASA ADS literature and citation workflows
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skill bundle for NASA ADS literature search, published-claim checks, citation export, library management, metrics, and related-paper lookups.
defaultPrompt: Search NASA ADS for recent papers on exoplanet atmospheres.
Check whether a claim or topic has been mentioned in the literature.
Show citation metrics for these ADS bibcodes.
